jaxmodel.model

class jaxmodel.model.JaxNLPModel(var_spec: ~jaxmodel.variables.VariableSpec, objective_fun, constraints: ~typing.Sequence[~jaxmodel.constraints.ConstraintEntry] | None = None, bounds: ~jaxmodel.bounds.BoundSpec | None = None, parameter_spec: ~jaxmodel.parameters.ParameterSpec | None = None, dtype=<class 'jax.numpy.float64'>, jit_compile: bool = True)[source]
